compiled_state.title: end-to-end integration test fixture for brainstorm:complete tag flow
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
As a developer verifying this epic's correctness, I want a single fixture test exercising the full tag flow so that regressions in migration, filter, sprint message, or brainstorm highlight are caught in one place.

## Done Definition
- New test file (tests/scripts/test-brainstorm-tag-flow.sh or equivalent) creates a fixture .tickets-tracker/ with:
  - Open epic with PIL heading in description
  - Open epic with PIL heading in a comment event body (not description)
  - Open epic with no PIL
  - Open epic with children but no PIL (scrutiny-gap case)
- Test runs the migration phase and asserts:
  - Exactly the 2 PIL-bearing epics receive the `brainstorm:complete` tag
  - stdout contains `UNMATCHED: <id>` lines for the 2 non-PIL epics (no-PIL + scrutiny-gap)
- Test runs `sprint-list-epics.sh --has-tag=brainstorm:complete` and asserts output matches the tagged set
- Test asserts sprint SKILL.md hidden-epics note format contains `/dso:brainstorm` (or runs the sprint flow and inspects output)
- Test asserts brainstorm no-arg list surfaces the scrutiny-gap epic in its own labeled category
- Test is idempotent (clean teardown; re-runnable)

## Considerations
- [Testing] Follows existing fixture patterns in tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh
- [Testing] End-to-end runs last in the story sequence — covers integration across all prior stories

## Escalation Policy
Escalate when blocked.
